scenario_focus: Residency evidence missing for Iowa aid and SAP third-party documentation missing.

documents.purpose: Confirms FAFSA submission details, SAI, and school code routing.
Provides household and income verification fields used for review.
Provides AGI/tax-year support and transcript completeness status.
Captures Iowa state-aid context and residency support details.
Includes SAP context, attempted/earned credits, and support docs status.

expected_catches.title: Iowa residency evidence gap
expected_catches.description: No Residency evidence in Iowa aid form.

expected_catches.title: SAP support documentation gap
expected_catches.description: SAP appeal lists third-party documentation as pending and advisor plan status as draft only.
